description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text says Democrats have kept DHS shut down since February 14th, references the House Speaker, full funding for ICE and Border Patrol, a budget blueprint and a June 1st deadline, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; The Radical Left Democrats have kept DHS shut down since February 14th
